title: Cherry Carpet
description: Turn Pink Petals into a carpet like block
body:
# About Pack
Turn Pink Petals into a carpet like block. Pink Petals model is too complex for my liking and leaf carpets are just the best. 
Due to only changing models is likely to be compatible with most texture packs.

### External link:
* [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/cherry-carpet/)
